Off Calendar May-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Burns International Services Corporation's Motion For Order To Compel Discovery and For Sanctions is ordered off calendar as the proof of service is inadequate. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
